26 template <>
27 class StopMotion<franka::JointPositions> : public JointMotion {
28  public:
34  explicit StopMotion(const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor = 1.0)
35  : JointMotion(JointState(Vector7d::Zero()), ReferenceType::kRelative, relative_dynamics_factor) {}
36 };
37 
41 template <>
42 class StopMotion<franka::JointVelocities> : public JointVelocityMotion {
43  public:
49  explicit StopMotion(const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor = 1.0)
50  : JointVelocityMotion(Vector7d::Zero(), franka::Duration(0), relative_dynamics_factor) {}
51 };
52 
56 template <>
57 class StopMotion<franka::CartesianPose> : public CartesianWaypointMotion {
58  public:
64  explicit StopMotion(const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor = 1.0)
65  : CartesianWaypointMotion(
66  {PositionWaypoint<CartesianState>{
67  {
68  .target = RobotPose(),
69  .hold_target_duration = franka::Duration(50),
70  },
71  ReferenceType::kRelative}},
72  relative_dynamics_factor) {}
73 };
74 
78 template <>
79 class StopMotion<franka::CartesianVelocities> : public CartesianVelocityMotion {
80  public:
86  explicit StopMotion(const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor = 1.0)
87  : CartesianVelocityMotion(RobotVelocity(), franka::Duration(0), relative_dynamics_factor) {}
88 };
89 
93 struct TorqueStopParams {
95  Vector7d damping{defaultJointImpedanceDamping()};
96 
101  double ramp_duration{0.2};
102 
104  double velocity_epsilon{0.02};
105 
107  double max_duration{2.0};
108 
110  bool compensate_coriolis{true};
111 
113  double max_delta_tau{1.0};
114 };
115 
124 template <>
125 class StopMotion<franka::Torques> : public Motion<franka::Torques> {
126  public:
127  explicit StopMotion(const TorqueStopParams &params = {}) : params_(params) {}
128 
129  protected:
130  void initImpl(const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<franka::Torques> &previous_command) override;
131 
132  franka::Torques nextCommandImpl(
133  const RobotState &robot_state, franka::Duration time_step, franka::Duration rel_time, franka::Duration abs_time,
134  const std::optional<franka::Torques> &previous_command) override;
135 
136  private:
137  TorqueStopParams params_;
138  // Initial torque command captured in initImpl.
139  Vector7d tau_start_{Vector7d::Zero()};
140 };
141
